name: Asparagus Parmigiano
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain cooked asparagus and arrange in a shallow baking dish.
2. Saute onion and garlic in oil in a saucepan until golden.
3. Add salt, Tabasco sauce, and tomatoes; simmer uncovered for 10 minutes.
4. Add thyme and tomato sauce; simmer for another 20 minutes.
5. Pour the mixture over the asparagus.
6. Place slices of mozzarella cheese on top.
7. Sprinkle with Parmesan.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 30 minutes.
Yield: 6-8 servings
